instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall provide engine braking during vehicle deceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Vehicle_Deceleration exceeds Deceleration_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Deceleration > Deceleration_Threshold AND Engine_Speed < Max_RPM THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable engine braking when brake pedal is pressed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall perform downshift when Brake_Pedal_Status equals Pressed.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Braking_Speed THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall increase engine braking during downhill driving.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Hill_Mode equals Downhill.

L4_requirements: IF Hill_Mode = Downhill AND Vehicle_Speed > Downhill_Speed THEN Maintain_LowGear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable engine braking only above minimum vehicle speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger engine braking when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Braking_Speed_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Braking_Speed_Threshold AND Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent excessive engine braking.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit downshift when Engine_Speed exceeds Max_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM AND Downshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain lower gear during sustained braking.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain current low gear when Brake_Pedal_Status equals Pressed continuously.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Braking_Speed THEN Maintain_LowGear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable engine braking when throttle is applied.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall cancel engine braking when Throttle_Position exceeds Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Threshold AND Engine_Braking_Mode = TRUE THEN Cancel_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable engine braking during transmission faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit engine braking when Transmission_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Fault = TRUE AND Downshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall provide strong engine braking during rapid deceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger aggressive downshift when Deceleration_Rate exceeds Critical_Deceleration.

L4_requirements: IF Deceleration_Rate > Critical_Deceleration AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Braking_Speed THEN Trigger_Downshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable engine braking only when engine speed is within safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall allow engine braking when Engine_Speed is below Max_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed >= Max_RPM AND Downshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Downshift
